name: Metronidazole
description: Kwayoyin Nitroimidazole tare da kyakkyawan tsarin anaerobic da protozoal. Mahimmanci don shiga cikin rauni na ciki / hanji don rufe furen gut anaerobic. Yawancin lokaci ana amfani dashi a hade tare da ciprofloxacin.
dose: 500 MG IV q6-8h. PO: 500 mg q8h (idan an yarda da baki).
contraindications: An san metronidazole ko nitroimidazole alerji
warnings: Disulfiram-kamar amsa tare da barasa -- kar a cinye barasa yayin jiyya da 48h bayan.
Yana iya haifar da neuropathy na gefe tare da amfani mai tsawo.
Guji a farkon farkon watanni uku idan zai yiwu.

pediatric.note: Amintacce a cikin manyan yara. Guji a cikin jarirai.

obstetric.note: Guji a farkon farkon watanni uku idan zai yiwu. Yi amfani da na biyu/na uku na uku lokacin da ya dace a likitanci -- fa'ida yawanci ya fi haɗarin kamuwa da cututtukan anaerobic mai tsanani.

source: JTS CPG: Wound Care / Abdominal Trauma
